mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show negative mean during rate cuts or Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending capacity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in >65% of instances when unemployment rises above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in retail sales and housing starts fail to predict positive 60-day returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, generating positive short-term S&P 500 momentum.
failure_condition: Industrial production growth fails to correlate with 5-day forward returns during early-cycle phases, or signal accuracy drops below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate margins and triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: High inflation months consistently precede positive 20-day equity returns, or Rank IC remains negative over rolling 2-year periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Divergent payroll and unemployment trends fail to predict 20-day returns, or joint signal accuracy falls below 50% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth reflects expanding economic output and corporate earnings potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP revisions show no predictive power for 60-day equity returns, or forward returns are negative during GDP expansion quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal weakening manufacturing demand and inventory drawdowns, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Negative industrial production trends fail to predict negative 5-day returns, or signal accuracy remains below 50% across multiple market cycles.
